name: Interactive Methodology and CFS Capability Explorer

priority_1: WSACC true utility capacity / service areas / capacity constraints
Official school enrollment and capacity by school
Countywide future land use / small-area plan GIS
priority_2: Planned local road projects with dates/status

roadmap_section_added: Current demo-ready internal planning intelligence prototype
Refined due diligence scoring after verified data
Scenario planning and executive reporting improvements
Possible simplified public viewer only after validation and governance

model_governance_behavior.phase16c_finding_summarized: Tax/value helped; Accela, Central Area Plan, utility proxy, and current-context metadata remain useful context but are not recommended for the current best internal model.

model_safety_verification.raw_model_terms_in_methodology_file: Only aggregate ranking distribution keys and safety flags are referenced in code; visible labels are formatted and no parcel-level output is shown.

tests.reason: No frontend unit test runner configuration was present in package scripts; validation was performed with typecheck, lint, build, and browser smoke.

validation_results.backend_validation: not run; backend files were not changed

console_notes: Browser console captured existing Next dev RSC payload fallback messages during local mode switching.
Browser console also captured ArcGIS terrain tile errors after the map initialized on Overview.
No Methodology blank page, parcel-level prediction exposure, or Methodology SceneView render was observed.

remaining_known_limitations: Methodology content is curated static frontend content rather than markdown-imported docs.
Aggregate model summaries depend on existing backend endpoints when available and fall back to safe static text.
No automated frontend test runner is configured for component-level tests.
Local Next dev can emit RSC fallback messages after production build; restarting npm run dev:cfs restored a responsive dev stack.
